ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "contig" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the contig */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene in the contig */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene in the contig */,
  "gene" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gaps" TEXT /* Gaps in the sequence (e.g., 0/0) */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage percentage of the gene in the contig */,
  "identity" REAL /* Identity percentage of the gene in the contig */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the gene */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product or description of the gene */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the genomic data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_contig FOREIGN KEY ("contig") REFERENCES contigs ("contig_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_accession FOREIGN KEY ("accession") REFERENCES accessions ("accession_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_gene FOREIGN KEY ("gene") REFERENCES genes ("gene_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "contigs" (
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contig */,
  "contig_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the contig */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the contig in base pairs */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the contig (e.g., sequencing project, database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the contig */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the contig was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the contig */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the contig */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the contig is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "function" TEXT /* Functional description of the gene */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the gene (e.g., IncFIA, Col440I) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the gene */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the gene */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the gene is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessions" (
  "accession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accession */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number of the genomic data */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database (e.g., NCBI, GenBank) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the accession number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the accession was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the accession */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the accession is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product or gene */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry the product is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry the annotation is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the annotation is private */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the annotation is flagged for review */,
  "parent_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to reference a parent annotation for hierarchical comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_parent_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)
